name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A little something from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled recently — no guilt, no pressure, life gets busy. We just wanted you to know the door's still open at Bright Smile Dental, and if it helps, here's a personal 20% off code for your next visit:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days and works on any cleaning or visit you book with us. Our goal has always been to make dental care feel a little less scary — gentle cleanings, modern tech, zero sales pressure.

If something about your last experience didn't sit right, I'd genuinely love to hear about it — just reply to this email and it comes straight to us.

Take care either way,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — quick heads up that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in about a week. Use it whenever you're ready, no pressure. Reply STOP to opt out.

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
